final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: infographic-diagram / medical illustration
Asset type: 3D anatomical visualization for medical education, square format
Primary request: highly realistic 3D medical illustration of the human cardiovascular system — heart cross-section with major vessels, suitable for science communication
Scene/backdrop: deep dark background (near black) to maximize anatomical contrast and clarity
Subject: human heart cut open to reveal all four chambers (left atrium, right atrium, left ventricle, right ventricle), valves clearly depicted; major vessels including aorta, pulmonary artery, superior and inferior vena cava; coronary arteries highlighted in gold along the heart surface; arterial system in vivid red, venous system in deep blue; blood flow direction indicated by arrows and subtle dynamic light-trail effects
Style/medium: photorealistic 3D render combined with Netter-style precise medical illustration; high anatomical accuracy, textbook-grade detail
Composition/framing: front-facing slightly angled 3/4 view, centered composition, generous negative space around the structure for annotation labels
Lighting/mood: dramatic studio lighting with soft rim light to accentuate depth and surface texture; cool dark ambient, warm accent on arterial red and gold coronary paths
Color palette: deep black background; vivid arterial red (#CC0000 range); deep venous blue (#003399 range); gold highlights for coronary arteries; neutral warm tones for myocardial tissue
Materials/textures: visible myocardial fiber texture on heart muscle walls; glossy wet-tissue sheen on inner chamber surfaces; semi-transparent vessel walls showing layered structure
Constraints: preserve anatomical accuracy of all four chambers and valve positions; keep label-ready white space around the illustration; arterial = red, venous = blue, coronary = gold — no color swap
Avoid: cartoon anatomy, oversimplified shapes, neon glow overload, cluttered background, missing coronary artery detail
